telegramText: MARKET WRAP — May 7, 2026 Markets traded in conflicted fashion as robust US consumer data reinforced late-cycle dynamics while crypto volatility and UK political uncertainty created cross-currents. Central bank dovish pivots supported risk assets, but mixed regime signals kept positioning cautious ahead of potential displacement scenarios. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $79,884 · ETH: $2,289 · SOL: $88.09 · GOLD: $4,708 · SPY: $731.58 (+1.1%) · QQQ: $694.94 (+2.0%) · VIX: $17.08 (-1.8%) · TLT: $85.65 (+0.3%) · DXY: $98.24 (+0.2%) · OIL: $97.66 (+2.7%) EVENING NEWS ▲ Starmer braces for heavy Labour losses in elections as counting begins ▲ DraftKings Profit Beats Estimates as Sportsbook Sales Grow ▲ Bitcoin falls under $80K but four-month high in weekly BTC ETF inflows may curb selling ▲ Stellar expands role in crypto payments stack as Mesh selects it for settlement layer ▲ Banxico cuts rates 25 bps to 6.50% as expected ▲ US Consumer Borrowing Increased in March by Most Since 2022 SCENARIO SHIFTS ▲ Late Cycle: Strong consumer borrowing and crypto institutional adoption signal continued expansion ▲ Recession: UK political instability raises recession risks in major economy ▲ Goldilocks: US consumer strength, Mexico easing, and sector growth support soft landing narrative ▲ Displacement: Crypto payment infrastructure adoption shows technological disruption accelerating REGIME CHECK — Neutral · Neutral · EXPANSION · Gauge: 43.2/100 UPCOMING — HIGH IMPACT US Federal Funds Benchmark Rate — May 15, 07:00 PM UTC (prev: 3.50% - 3.75%) US Retail sales (MoM)(Apr) — May 14, 12:30 PM UTC (prev: 1.7%) US Unseasonally Adjusted Consumer Price Index (YoY)(Apr) — May 13, 06:30 PM UTC (prev: 3.3%) US Producer Price Index (YoY)(Apr) — May 13, 12:30 PM UTC (prev: 4.0%) EU GDP(YoY) (Revised) (Q1) — May 13, 09:00 AM UTC (prev: 0.8%) EU GDP(QoQ) (Revised) (Q1) — May 13, 09:00 AM UTC (prev: 0.1%) CONTRARIAN • Strong consumer borrowing might indicate desperation rather than confidence, suggesting upcoming cre • Crypto ETF inflows could be institutional distribution to retail, not genuine institutional adoption agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
